# Follow-up email template

```
Subject: Recap and next steps — <topic>

Hi <name>,

Thanks for the time today. Quick recap of what we agreed:

- <decision 1>
- <decision 2>

Next steps from our side:

- <action> — by <date>
- <action> — by <date>

Next steps on your side:

- <action> — by <date>

Let me know if I missed anything.

— {USERNAME}
```

After sending, log to [Actions](../actions/index.md) and link the email thread on the [client page](../people/clients.md).
